---
title: "Electrodynamics"
format: html
---

# Electrodynamics

These are the lecture notes and problem sets for the Electrodynamics course. The material is organized into short topic modules; the first entry provides a concise geometry review useful for covariant electrodynamics.

## Course Outline

- [Conventions and Notation](conventions.qmd)
- [Geometry Review for Electrodynamics](geometry-review.qmd)
- [Calculus on Minkowski Spacetime](calculus-on-minkowski-spacetime.qmd)
- [Maxwell Equations in Covariant Form](maxwell-equations-forms.qmd)
- [Accelerated Observers and Born Rigidity](accel.qmd)
- [Energy of the Electromagnetic Field](em-energy.qmd)
- [Radiation from a Moving Charge](moving-charge-radiation.qmd)
- [Thomson Scattering](thomson-scattering.qmd)

{{< include /_footer.qmd >}}
